BabyDoge

KatanaInu

Character in Katana Inu game on Baby Doge

We have designed the special in-game character to show our tribute to the great Baby Doge community and now the community members can also claim one of their own through our NFT collection. These characters can be used as in-game skins and will have several different variations.

Powered By IMX

Katana InuBabyDoge

utilities

In-Game Usability

Holders will be able to use their character in-game.

Free Weapon NFT

All the BabyDoge x Katana Inu Genesis holders will be able to claim a free weapon NFT.

Closed Beta Access

Exclusive Access to Katana Inu Closed Beta builds and future Testnet build of the game.

Ranking Points

Holders will have an advantage in accumulating ranking points when in-game Play2Earn ranking system goes live.

Forged from ancient ice at the heart of the frozen mountains, it embodies the resilience and power of the legendary hero who braved the treacherous slopes to claim it

Media

Katana Inu is an on-chain multiplayer game

With both Free2Play and Play & Earn elements, featuring insanely snappy sword and spell fighting.

Don't miss our latest news

KATANA INU IS A A PROJECT FROM CHAINVISION GAMES Nothing on this website constitutes financial advice, and it is always recommended to consult a qualified financial advisor before participating in any token or NFT purchases.

Buy Katana Inu NFTs only from katanainu.com or kainu.io subdomains to be safe. Check the website's address on our main website www.katanainu.com and go to the Minting NFTs section to verify. Ask in our telegram or discord channel for confirmation. Avoid other websites!
